title: kericodon crispus
intro: Kericodon crispus, also known as Pteris multifida, is a type of fern that belongs to the Pteris genus. It is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kericodon crispus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. It can be prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
